title: `index.json` is missing `mediaType`
body:
The https://specs.opencontainers.org/image-spec/image-index/ says:

> `mediaType` string
> This property SHOULD be used and [remain compatible](https://specs.opencontainers.org/image-spec/image-index/media-types.md#compatibility-matrix) with earlier versions of this specification and with other similar external formats. When used, this field MUST contain the media type application/vnd.oci.image.index.v1+json. This field usage differs from the [descriptor](https://specs.opencontainers.org/image-spec/image-index/descriptor.md#properties) use of mediaType.

However, `skopeo` seems to produce `oci-archive` without the `mediaType`:
```
$ skopeo copy docker://docker.io/busybox oci-archive:/tmp/busybox.tar
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob e59838ecfec5 done   | 
Copying config 08ef35a1c3 done   | 
Writing manifest to image destination
$ tar tvf /tmp/busybox.tar
drwxr-xr-x 0/0               0 2026-01-06 17:47 blobs/
drwxr-xr-x 0/0               0 2026-01-06 17:47 blobs/sha256/
-rw-r--r-- 0/0             459 2026-01-06 17:47 blobs/sha256/08ef35a1c3f050afbbd64194ffd1b8d5878659f5491567f26d1c814513ae9649
-rw-r--r-- 0/0             610 2026-01-06 17:47 blobs/sha256/870e815c3a50dd0f6b40efddb319c72c32c3ee340b5a3e8945904232ccd12f44
-rw-r--r-- 0/0         2213754 2026-01-06 17:47 blobs/sha256/e59838ecfec5e79eb4371e9995ef86c8000fe1c67d7b9fa7b57e996d9ba772ff
-rw-r--r-- 0/0             186 2026-01-06 17:47 index.json
-rw-r--r-- 0/0              30 2026-01-06 17:47 oci-layout
$ tar x -O -f /tmp/busybox.tar index.json | jq
{
  "schemaVersion": 2,
  "manifests": [
    {
      "mediaType": "application/vnd.oci.image.manifest.v1+json",
      "digest": "sha256:870e815c3a50dd0f6b40efddb319c72c32c3ee340b5a3e8945904232ccd12f44",
      "size": 610
    }
  ]
}
```

It'd be good to follow the recommendation from the specification and add the `"mediaType": "application/vnd.oci.image.index.v1+json"`.

Note that docker does this right, in its hybrid archive format:
```
$ docker pull docker.io/busybox
Using default tag: latest
latest: Pulling from library/busybox
Digest: sha256:d80cd694d3e9467884fcb94b8ca1e20437d8a501096cdf367a5a1918a34fc2fd
Status: Image is up to date for busybox:latest
docker.io/library/busybox:latest
$ docker save docker.io/busybox > /tmp/busybox-docker.tar
$ tar tvf /tmp/busybox-docker.tar
drwxr-xr-x 0/0               0 2024-09-26 23:31 blobs/
drwxr-xr-x 0/0               0 1970-01-01 01:00 blobs/sha256/
-rw-r--r-- 0/0             459 2024-09-26 23:31 blobs/sha256/08ef35a1c3f050afbbd64194ffd1b8d5878659f5491567f26d1c814513ae9649
-rw-r--r-- 0/0             733 2024-09-26 23:31 blobs/sha256/24c13796b09ad50f286b2860d40501363017a4b8e85a5b2d6f38be992917a45c
-rw-r--r-- 0/0             400 1970-01-01 01:00 blobs/sha256/8a3efdac6f7072b514547fa511a8f8a0e9d9d084f3cc8d59c0663c9ae3719c84
-rw-r--r-- 0/0         4669440 2024-09-26 23:31 blobs/sha256/e14542cc062958c3bfada9c260a6ae47bb2906fd8b514999774760710dbce3cb
-rw-r--r-- 0/0             363 1970-01-01 01:00 index.json
-rw-r--r-- 0/0             458 1970-01-01 01:00 manifest.json
-rw-r--r-- 0/0              31 1970-01-01 01:00 oci-layout
-rw-r--r-- 0/0              90 1970-01-01 01:00 repositories
$ tar x -O -f /tmp/busybox-docker.tar index.json | jq
{
  "schemaVersion": 2,
  "mediaType": "application/vnd.oci.image.index.v1+json",
  "manifests": [
    {
      "mediaType": "application/vnd.oci.image.manifest.v1+json",
      "digest": "sha256:8a3efdac6f7072b514547fa511a8f8a0e9d9d084f3cc8d59c0663c9ae3719c84",
      "size": 400,
      "annotations": {
        "io.containerd.image.name": "docker.io/library/busybox:latest",
        "org.opencontainers.image.ref.name": "latest"
      }
    }
  ]
}
```

comments.body: Thanks! You’re right, the MIME type should be included. Transferring to container-libs where that can be fixed.
